description: CI quality gates validation for ci-gates milestone

assertions.evidence: npm run lint exits 0 (0 errors, 4 warnings). Lint step at index 3, before build step at index 6 in build.yml.
npm run format:check exits 0. 'All matched files use Prettier code style!'. Format check step at index 4, before build step at index 6.
npm test exits 0. 7 suites, 98 tests all passing. Test step at index 5, before build step at index 6.
Matrix strategy includes all 3 OS targets: macos-latest, ubuntu-latest, windows-latest. All gate steps run inside the same matrix job.
Step ordering confirmed: checkout(0) → setup-node(1) → npm ci(2) → lint(3) → format-check(4) → test(5) → build(6). All gate indices < build index.

No gate steps have 'if' conditions or 'continue-on-error'. release job has 'needs: build', so it's blocked when build job fails. Non-zero gate exit prevents build step execution by default GitHub Actions behavior.
